findings.detail: Variables that are written but never subsequently read.

data.role: procedure status output from 'CopyVariable' parameter 'Status' is ignored after the procedure writes it.

findings.detail: Procedure status outputs should be checked in control logic instead of being ignored or shown only in UI.

findings.detail: BasePicture code must stay inside frame modules.
findings.fingerprint: spec.basepicture_direct_code|tests/fixtures/corpus/valid/BuiltinCalls.s|||BasePicture contains direct code. The engineering spec only allows base-picture code inside a frame module.
findings.message: BasePicture contains direct code. The engineering spec only allows base-picture code inside a frame module.
